definition: Unique sample identifier assigned by the eDNA Expeditions project (e.g., EE0493).
Volume of seawater filtered for the sample, in milliliters.
Date the sampling event was conducted; recorded in DD/MM/YYYY format.
Local name of the specific sampling site within the marine World Heritage area.
Longitude of the sampling site in decimal degrees (WGS84).
Latitude of the sampling site in decimal degrees (WGS84).
Estimated radius, in meters, of the circle around the reported coordinates within which the actual sampling location is expected to fall.
Name of the UNESCO marine World Heritage site to which the sampling area belongs.
Concentration of extracted DNA from the filtered sample, in nanograms per microliter (ng/μL).
Depth at which the sample was collected, in meters below the sea surface.
Temperature of the seawater at the time of sampling, in degrees Celsius.
